title: Warm Gooey French Cheese Gratin
description: A comforting, lazy-sunday French dish featuring garlic powder and a blend of cheeses, perfect for a relaxing meal. This macrobiotic-friendly recipe is made with wholesome ingredients and is free from animal products.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the whole wheat bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, mix together the vegan cheese shreds, garlic powder, dijon mustard, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil and chopped fresh thyme.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of toasted bread slices.
Pour half of the olive oil and thyme mixture over the bread layer.
Spread half of the cheese mixture over the bread layer.
Repeat the layers, starting with the bread, then the remaining olive oil and thyme mixture, and finally the remaining cheese mixture.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
